exit_codes.112: unsafe public exposure, auth, DM, or group policy
exit_codes.113: missing or incorrect variable cost inputs, fixture integrity, or invoice boundary
exit_codes.114: secret/account leakage or config-only channel health claim
exit_codes.115: missing cap, rate/concurrency limit, fallback, or kill switch

formula.monthly_total: fixed_infra + model_input + model_output + tool + media + channel_plugin + egress_observability
